cards.front: What is the primary function of the client in a client-server program?
cards.back: To request a file from the server

cards.front: What is the primary function of the server in a client-server program?
cards.back: To provide the requested file to the client

cards.front: What type of communication is used between the client and server in this type of program?
What is the purpose of the server sending back the contents of the requested file?
cards.back: To fulfill the request made by the client

cards.front: What should the client do if the requested file is not present on the server?
cards.back: Send an error message or request the file to be downloaded from a different location
